hero.name: Jose Mora
hero.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: +6 years building complete digital ecosystems. From code to infrastructure.

about.title: About me
about.p1: As a Full Stack Software Engineer, my focus goes beyond code: I specialize in designing and orchestrating <highlight>complete digital ecosystems</highlight>, ensuring their functionality, performance, security, and scalability from development to deployment.
about.p2: My greatest strength is <highlight>connecting the seemingly unconnectable</highlight>. I have a proven track record architecting interoperability between disparate platforms (Laravel, .NET, WordPress) and automating critical business processes.
about.p3: Recently, I've deepened into DevOps culture and Microservices architecture, implementing containerized Linux server environments with Docker, with advanced network security and full observability.

items.description: Development, deployment, and administration of 5+ websites for clients in the US and Latin America. Corporate sites, WooCommerce e-commerce, content portals, and landing pages optimized for SEO and conversion.

Designed and implemented the MOP model (Product Operating Margin) for the Cement, Concrete, Aggregates, and Clinker segments, replicating SAP ECC transaction logic (MB51, KSB1, VF05, FBL5N, COOIS) from the FI/CO/MM/SD/PP modules in native SQL on SAP HANA. Built 6 production queries, 11 Power Query (M) stages, and a tabular model versioned as a Power BI Project (.pbip/TMDL) with DAX measures and a dimensional rules engine of 2,900+ combinations. Detected and fixed cost duplications worth $8M+ per year, enabling monthly financial reporting fully auditable against the ERP.

Maintenance and evolution of the international mobile top-up app (React Native, iOS and Android). Integrated the NMI payment processor, fixed legacy defects from prior development cycles, shipped new features, and managed releases on the App Store and Google Play. Direct production support for users in Latin America and the US.

Replicated and scaled the complete software architecture (Laravel/WordPress/Moodle) for the launch of American Elite School, Florida Global University, and Universidad Tecnológica Baden Powell. Automated enrollments with a business rules engine and real-time MySQL database synchronization.

Digitized and optimized personnel management processes using the complete Microsoft stack. Designed end-to-end solutions with Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, and SQL Server, eliminating critical bottlenecks and enabling real-time reporting with Power BI.

Built and scaled the e-learning platform. Integrated Microsoft 365 via Graph API to automate Teams classes. Implemented Business Intelligence with Power BI and developed Web Scraping modules for automatic data ingestion.
As the sole developer, designed the complete delivery ecosystem: RESTful API in Laravel, 4 mobile apps in Ionic, web panels in Angular, real-time geolocation, and full deployment on AWS.
Implemented the real-time tracking module with custom maps, native hardware integration (Camera, GPS), and spatial SQL query optimization.

mop.title: MOP - Product Operating Margin Model
mop.description: Business intelligence model for the Cement, Concrete, Aggregates, and Clinker segments at Grupo Estrella. Replicated SAP ECC logic (FI/CO/MM/SD/PP) in native SQL on SAP HANA, with a versioned tabular model in Power BI Project (.pbip/TMDL) and a dimensional rules engine of 2,900+ combinations.

deone.title: De One - Delivery Platform
deone.description: Complete delivery ecosystem: RESTful API in Laravel, 4 mobile apps (Customer, Partner, Driver, Kitchen) in Ionic, web panels in Angular, real-time geolocation, and AWS deployment.

progracademy.title: Progracademy - E-learning
progracademy.description: E-learning platform with Microsoft 365 integration via Graph API for automating Teams classes, Business Intelligence with Power BI, and web scraping for automatic content ingestion.

squuad.title: Squuad - University Portals
squuad.description: Academic management system and virtual classroom replicated for 3 universities. Automated enrollment engine with business rules. Laravel + WordPress + Moodle integration with real-time sync.

faimlab.title: Faim Lab - Web Development
faimlab.description: Development and administration of multiple digital platforms for clients in the US and Latin America. Corporate sites, e-commerce, and content portals.

hablax.title: Hablax - Mobile Recharge App
hablax.description: International mobile recharge application for the Hablax communications platform. Available on Android and iOS.

homelab.title: Homelab - Home Enterprise Server
homelab.description: Ubuntu server with containerized microservices architecture. AdGuard Home, Nginx Proxy Manager, Cloudflare Tunnel, Netdata monitoring, WireGuard VPN, and custom management CLI.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I'm open to new opportunities and collaborations. If you have a project in mind or just want to connect, don't hesitate to reach out.
contact.error: Error sending. Try again or write me directly.

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! 👋 I'm José's AI assistant. Ask me about his experience, projects, or tech stack.
chatbot.error: Sorry, there was an error. Please try again.
chatbot.rateLimit: There's high demand right now 🙏. Please try again in a minute, or reach out to José directly via email or WhatsApp.
